name: cen1_chrI
description: Centromere 1 (cen1) on S. pombe chromosome I. ~35 kb. Domain layout from centre outward: cnt1 (central core, ~5 kb, unique non-repetitive sequence binding Mis6/Sim4 and loading CENP-A^Cnp1) flanked symmetrically by imr1L/R (innermost repeats, ~5 kb each, partial otr-like sequence plus a tDNA boundary cluster) flanked by otr1L/R (outer repeats, the dg/dh tandem cassettes carrying H3K9me Clr4-Swi6 heterochromatin). Otr boundaries are defined by tRNA-Ala/Gly clusters.
expected_copy_count: 1 monocentric centromere per chromosome; dg/dh otr cassettes 2-10 copies per side
